title: Dividend accounting: profitPerShare, payouts, and distribute
scope: File: stack_wbnb.sol (profitPerShare_, payoutsTo_, dividendBalance_, distribute, allocateFees)
what_to_reason: Correctness of profitPerShare_ updates and how dividends are credited
Safe handling of int256 conversions and under/overflows in payoutsTo_
Periodic distribution logic correctness and time-based arithmetic
Edge case handling when tokenSupply_ == 0 during distribution
how_to_reason: Review `allocateFees` for allocation split between instant and drip pools
Manually simulate profitPerShare_ changes from allocateFees and distribute
Audit `dividendsOf` int256 -> uint256 math and ensure non-negative results
Check `dailyEstimate` uses and assumptions about `dividendBalance_` and payoutRate_
edge_cases: Time manipulation to trigger large `profit` payouts or zeroing dividendBalance_
payoutsTo_ underflow/overflow when many transfers or sells occur in quick succession
Small tokenSupply_ leading to massive per-share profit due to division
